economic_notes: Nation has 25% ownership in Lhai Ventures Limited Partnership (cost method). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: 0987339 BC Ltd. and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd. COVID-19 related funding received: $667,211 from ISC and $12,840 from First Nations Health Authority.
notes: Auditor name not included in the provided financial statement text. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,152,899) + CMHC ($668,813) + First Nations Health Authority ($173,247) + Province of BC ($55,000) = $4,050,359. OSR includes Carrier Sekani Tribal Council ($3,961,317), Resource industry revenue ($1,399,947), Other revenue ($895,070), Carrier Sekani Family Services ($430,251), Earnings from GBEs ($245,082), Prince George Aboriginal Employment and Training ($98,840), Ottawa Trust Fund ($1,389). Accumulated surplus per financial statements is $19,895,799 but Note 15 shows $17,895,799 — discrepancy in the document. Two GBEs (0987339 BC Ltd. and Stellako Custom Wood Ltd.) accounted for by modified equity method and excluded from consolidation. Restricted cash of $513,804 related to unexpended gaming funds. No schedule of remuneration included in provided text. Expenses_infrastructure mapped to Operations and Maintenance segment. Expenses_administration mapped to Nation Government segment. Capital expenses of $1,448,069 not mapped to a standard category.
